# funnel_custom_metric (Resource)

Custom metric resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `aggregation` (String) Custom metric aggregation type. One of `SUM`, `COUNT`, `MIN`, `MAX`, or `NONE`.
- `description` (String) Custom metric description. Will be displayed in the Funnel UI.
- `name` (String) Custom metric name
- `unit` (String) Custom metric unit type. One of `number`, `percent`, `monetary`, or `duration`.
- `workspace` (String) Funnel workspace ID

### Optional

- `precision` (Number) Custom metric precision. Defines how many decimal places to show. One of `0`, `1`, `2`, `3`, or `4`. Default is 0.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Custom metric ID
